requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety and Civil Protection Requirements for BESS Installations in Morocco
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥BESS安装的消防安全与民事保护要求
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥BESS安裝的消防安全與民事保護要求

summary.en: Fire safety for BESS installations in Morocco is governed by the Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC) under the Ministry of Interior, which enforces fire-protection regulations for industrial and utility installations. Building and installation fire codes referencing IEC 62619 thermal-runaway requirements, gas detection, ventilation, fire suppression, and emergency response are applied on a project basis. BESS installations with a cumulative charging power exceeding 600 kW are classified under ICPE Rubric 2925-2 (Ateliers de charge d'accumulateurs au lithium), which triggers formal declaration or authorisation requirements under Moroccan industrial hazard prevention regulations administered by the Ministère de l'Environnement. For utility-scale BESS, the project EPC contractor, project owner, local civil-protection authority, and environmental regulator must agree on an installation fire-safety design including battery separation, thermal management, fire-suppression system type, emergency shutdown, and evacuation procedures. Insurers and project finance lenders may additionally require IEC 62619 or IEC 62933-5-2 thermal-runaway and fire-propagation evidence.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥BESS安装消防安全由内政部下属的民事保护总局（DGPC）管理，负责执行工业和公用事业装置的消防规范。以IEC 62619热失控要求、气体探测、通风、消防和应急响应为参考的建筑与安装消防规范按项目执行。累计充电功率超过600 kW的BESS装置被归类于ICPE Rubric 2925-2（锂离子蓄电池充电车间），根据摩洛哥环境部管理的工业危害预防法规，需履行正式申报或授权程序。对于公用事业规模BESS，项目EPC承包商、业主、地方民事保护部门及环境监管机构须就安装消防设计达成一致，包括电池间距、热管理、消防系统类型、紧急停机和疏散程序。保险方和项目融资贷款方还可能额外要求IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2热失控与火灾蔓延证据。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥BESS安裝消防安全由內政部下屬的民事保護總局（DGPC）管理，負責執行工業和公用事業裝置的消防規範。以IEC 62619熱失控要求、氣體探測、通風、消防和應急響應為參考的建築與安裝消防規範按項目執行。累計充電功率超過600 kW的BESS裝置被歸類於ICPE Rubric 2925-2（鋰離子蓄電池充電車間），根據摩洛哥環境部管理的工業危害預防法規，需履行正式申報或授權程序。對於公用事業規模BESS，項目EPC承包商、業主、地方民事保護部門及環境監管機構須就安裝消防設計達成一致，包括電池間距、熱管理、消防系統類型、緊急停機和疏散程序。保險方和項目融資貸款方還可能額外要求IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2熱失控與火災蔓延證據。

standards_or_laws: Moroccan regulations administered by the Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC)
ICPE Rubric 2925-2 (Ateliers de charge d'accumulateurs au lithium — formal declaration/authorisation required for BESS with cumulative charging power >600 kW)
IEC 62619:2022 (thermal-runaway requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries)
IEC 62933-5-2 (safety requirements for grid-integrated lithium-ion BESS)
Project-specific fire-safety design and civil-protection authority review

summary.en: China stationary BESS fire safety relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and project fire-safety review under national fire-protection standards (GB 50016, GB 50819). These Chinese fire-safety frameworks address similar concerns — thermal runaway, gas detection, suppression, separation — but are not directly accepted by Moroccan civil-protection authorities, project owners, insurers, or lenders as Moroccan fire-safety approval.
summary.zh: 中国固定式BESS消防安全以GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023及国家消防标准（GB 50016、GB 50819）下的项目消防审查为依据。这些中国消防安全框架涵盖类似关切——热失控、气体探测、抑制、间距——但不被摩洛哥民事保护部门、项目业主、保险方或贷款方直接接受为摩洛哥消防安全批准。
summary.zht: 中國固定式BESS消防安全以GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023及國家消防標準（GB 50016、GB 50819）下的項目消防審查為依據。這些中國消防安全框架涵蓋類似關切——熱失控、氣體探測、抑制、間距——但不被摩洛哥民事保護部門、項目業主、保險方或貸款方直接接受為摩洛哥消防安全批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 50016 (Code for fire protection design of buildings)
GB 50819 (Code for fire protection design of photovoltaic power stations)

gap.en: Prepare a fire-safety design package for the Morocco project covering: thermal-runaway propagation test evidence to IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2, gas and smoke detection specification, battery containment and separation, suppression system type and agent selection, ventilation design, emergency shutdown logic, spill containment, and emergency response procedures in French and Arabic for review by the Moroccan DGPC authority and project insurer. Chinese GB test data may support technical discussions but must be supplemented with IEC-route evidence.
gap.zh: 应为摩洛哥项目准备消防安全设计文件包，涵盖：IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延测试证据、气体和烟雾探测规格、电池隔离与间距、消防系统类型和灭火剂选择、通风设计、紧急停机逻辑、溢漏控制，以及供摩洛哥DGPC和项目保险方审查的法语和阿拉伯语应急程序。中国GB测试数据可用于技术讨论，但须以IEC路径证据补充。
gap.zht: 應為摩洛哥項目準備消防安全設計文件包，涵蓋：IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延測試證據、氣體和煙霧探測規格、電池隔離與間距、消防系統類型和滅火劑選擇、通風設計、緊急停機邏輯、溢漏控制，以及供摩洛哥DGPC和項目保險方審查的法語和阿拉伯語應急程序。中國GB測試數據可用於技術討論，但須以IEC路徑證據補充。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for installation approval by the Moroccan civil-protection authority (DGPC); IEC 62619 thermal-runaway evidence is de facto mandatory for project-finance and insurer acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese project fire-safety review (GB 44240-2024, GB 50016); Chinese approvals are not transferable to Morocco

source.publisher: Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese fire-safety documentation (GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023) is not accepted as Moroccan DGPC or project fire-safety approval. For BESS with cumulative charging power above 600 kW, confirm whether ICPE Rubric 2925-2 classification applies and obtain declaration or authorisation from the environmental authority. Prepare an IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 fire-safety package and engage the Moroccan DGPC and project insurer before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国消防安全文件（GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023）不被摩洛哥DGPC或项目消防安全批准接受。对于累计充电功率超过600 kW的BESS，应确认是否适用ICPE Rubric 2925-2分类，并从环境主管部门取得申报或授权。调试前应准备IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2消防安全文件包并与摩洛哥DGPC和项目保险方沟通。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國消防安全文件（GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023）不被摩洛哥DGPC或項目消防安全批准接受。對於累計充電功率超過600 kW的BESS，應確認是否適用ICPE Rubric 2925-2分類，並從環境主管部門取得申報或授權。調試前應準備IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2消防安全文件包並與摩洛哥DGPC和項目保險方溝通。
